2605.09942.title: HAGE: Harnessing Agentic Memory via RL-Driven Weighted Graph Evolution
2605.09942.paper_summary: Memory retrieval in agentic large language model (LLM) systems is often treated as a static lookup problem, relying on flat vector search or fixed binary relational graphs. However, fixed graph structures cannot capture the varying strength, confidence, and query-dependent relevance of relationships between events. In this paper, we propose HAGE, a weighted multi-relational memory framework that reconceptualizes retrieval as sequential, query-conditioned traversal over a unified relational memory graph. Memory is organized as relation-specific graph views over shared memory nodes, where each edge is associated with a trainable relation feature vector encoding multiple relational signals. Given a query, an LLM-based classifier identifies the relational intent, and a routing network dynamically modulates the corresponding dimensions of the edge embedding. Traversal scores are computed via a learned combination of semantic similarity and these query-conditioned edge representations. This allows memory traversal to prioritize high-utility relational paths while softly suppressing noisy or weakly relevant connections. Beyond adaptive traversal, HAGE further introduces a reinforcement learning-based training framework that jointly optimizes routing behavior and edge representations using downstream tasks. Finally, empirical results demonstrate improved long-horizon reasoning accuracy and a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off compared to state-of-the-art agentic memory systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/FredJiang0324/HAGE_MVPReview.
2605.09942.paper_summary_zh: 記憶檢索在代理大型語言模型（LLM）系統中通常被視為一個靜態查找問題，依賴於平面向量搜索或固定的二元關係圖。<lb/>然而，固定的圖結構無法捕捉事件之間關係的變化強度、自信心和查詢依賴的相關性。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了HAGE，一種加權多關係記憶框架，將檢索重新概念化為在統一關係記憶圖上的序列化、查詢條件遍歷。<lb/>記憶被組織為在共享記憶節點上的關係特定圖視圖，其中每條邊都與一個可訓練的關係特徵向量相關聯，編碼多個關係信號。<lb/>給定查詢，基於LLM的分類器識別關係意圖，而路由網絡動態調節邊嵌入的相應維度。<lb/>遍歷分數通過語義相似性和這些查詢條件邊表示的學習組合來計算。<lb/>這使得記憶遍歷能夠優先考慮高效用的關係路徑，同時柔和地抑制噪聲或弱相關的連接。<lb/>除了自適應遍歷，HAGE還進一步引入了一種基於強化學習的訓練框架，通過下游任務共同優化路由行為和邊表示。<lb/>最後，實證結果顯示，相較於最先進的代理記憶系統，長期推理準確性有所提高，並且在準確性和效率之間達成了良好的權衡。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/FredJiang0324/HAGE_MVPReview 獲得。
2605.09942.author: Dongming Jiang et.al.
2605.09942.authors: Dongming Jiang, Yi Li, Guanpeng Li, Qiannan Li, Bingzhe Li
